title: scrophularia × spuria
intro: Scrophularia × spuria, also known as the Hybrid Figwort or Spuria Figwort, is a type of flowering plant in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) that is a hybrid of two different species of Scrophularia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scrophularia × spuria include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including skin problems and digestive issues.
